author: Anonymous
title: Old Irish Mass Tract + Leabhar Breac
editions: Neil Xavier O'Donoghue, The Eucharist in pre-Norman Ireland (Notre Dame, IN: 2001), 71-7, 203-17
remarks: An "Old Irish Mass Tract" refers to a piece of text written in Old Irish, found within the Stowe Missal, which explains and describes the elements of the Catholic Mass according to the early Irish Church's understanding and practices; essentially, it's an ancient Irish language guide to the liturgy of the Mass as practiced in Ireland at the time
